'''ngashudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oosporogenesis|oosporogenesis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oosporogenesis|oosporogenesis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngashudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæshidhith|ngæshidhith]] || [[word:ngæshidhij|ngæshidhij]] || [[word:ngæshidhish|ngæshidhish]] || [[word:ngæshidhi|ngæshidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngashushudhuth|ngashushudhuth]] || [[word:ngashushudhuj|ngashushudhuj]] || [[word:ngashushudhush|ngashushudhush]] || [[word:ngashushudhu|ngashushudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngashudhuth|ngashudhuth]] || [[word:ngashudhuj|ngashudhuj]] || [[word:ngashudhush|ngashudhush]] || [[word:ngashudhu|ngashudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngashufdhuth|ngashufdhuth]] || [[word:ngashufdhuj|ngashufdhuj]] || [[word:ngashufdhush|ngashufdhush]] || [[word:ngashufdhuf|ngashufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngashudhuthu|ngashudhuthu]] || [[word:ngashudhuju|ngashudhuju]] || [[word:ngashudhushu|ngashudhushu]] || [[word:ngashudhuku|ngashudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngashudhuth|ngashudhuth]] || [[word:ngashudhuj|ngashudhuj]] || [[word:ngashudhush|ngashudhush]] || [[word:ngashudhu|ngashudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngashudhuthul|ngashudhuthul]] || [[word:ngashudhujul|ngashudhujul]] || [[word:ngashudhushul|ngashudhushul]] || [[word:ngashudhukul|ngashudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngashudhuthuthu|ngashudhuthuthu]] || [[word:ngashudhujuju|ngashudhujuju]] || [[word:ngashudhushushu|ngashudhushushu]] || [[word:ngashudhuku|ngashudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngashudhuthun|ngashudhuthun]] || [[word:ngashudhujun|ngashudhujun]] || [[word:ngashudhushun|ngashudhushun]] || [[word:ngashudhukun|ngashudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngashudhuthuoro|ngashudhuthuoro]] || [[word:ngashudhujuoro|ngashudhujuoro]] || [[word:ngashudhushuoro|ngashudhushuoro]] || [[word:ngashudhukuoro|ngashudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
